description_long: This is a heavily armored, dual-cannon combat vehicle with a low, wide profile and robust tracked propulsion system. The exterior is finished in a dark olive green with visible wear and mud on the tracks and lower hull, suggesting use in rugged environments. The vehicle features a central turret with two large cannons mounted side by side, and a smaller sensor or targeting module on top. The hull is angular with reinforced armor plating covering the front, sides, and turret, and there are visible hatches and vents for crew access and ventilation. Distinctive red insignias are painted on the turret sides, and the vehicle's tracks are wide and deeply treaded for maximum traction. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility in urban or battlefield scenarios.
description: A heavily armored, dual-cannon tracked combat vehicle in dark olive green with red insignias and robust, mud-streaked tracks. Features a central turret, reinforced plating, and a rugged, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dual cannons, central turret, and wide armored hull with visible insignia and heavy tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannons, side armor, red insignia, and detailed track system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, rear armor plating, and the full width of the vehicle's tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannons, side armor, insignia, and track details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large cannon mounts on the central turret, positioned side by side; one small sensor or targeting module on top of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with reinforced, angular panels covering the front, sides, and turret; appears thick and robust with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark olive green paint with visible mud and wear; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red circular insignias with a stylized symbol on both sides of the turret; no numbers or additional markings visible.
